description_long: This object is a halved avocado with its large, round seed still embedded in the center. The outer skin is dark brown to nearly black, rough, and bumpy, showing some natural irregularities and a slightly shriveled appearance. The exposed flesh is a muted yellow-green, with some browning and discoloration near the seed and edges, indicating age or oxidation. The seed is smooth, oval, and light brown, sitting prominently in the middle of the fruit. The cut surface is uneven, with visible fibrous texture and some moisture sheen. The avocado appears to be isolated against a plain, white background, with no visible stem attached.
description: A halved avocado with a dark, rough skin and a large brown seed in the center, showing some browning and aged flesh. The object is isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rough, dark skin and the seed protruding above the cut surface.
description_view_1: Angled top view highlighting the seed and the browning, uneven flesh around it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more of the cut surface and seed visible, showing discoloration near the edges.
description_view_3: Angled end view focusing on the seed and the depth of the cut, with the skin's texture prominent.
